description: Dashboard per gestire le regole del firewall OPNsense - Attiva/Disattiva regole

panels.description: Lista di tutte le regole del firewall con possibilità di attivazione/disattivazione

onClick.confirmText: Sei sicuro di voler eliminare questa regola?

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 
    r.rule_id,
    r.interface,
    r.direction,
    r.ip_protocol,
    r.action,
    r.source_address,
    r.source_port,
    r.destination_address,
    r.destination_port,
    r.description,
    r.enabled,
    r.sequence,
    r.created_at,
    r.updated_at
FROM firewall_rules r
ORDER BY r.sequence ASC, r.created_at DESC

panels.title: Regole Firewall

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_rules FROM firewall_rules
SELECT COUNT(*) as active_rules FROM firewall_rules WHERE enabled = true
SELECT COUNT(*) as disabled_rules FROM firewall_rules WHERE enabled = false

SELECT 
    action as "Action",
    COUNT(*) as "Count"
FROM firewall_rules 
WHERE enabled = true
GROUP BY action
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

panels.description: Pannello per azioni rapide sulle regole del firewall
panels.title: Controlli Rapidi

panels.description: Log delle ultime modifiche alle regole del firewall

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 
    al.timestamp,
    al.user_id,
    al.action,
    al.resource,
    al.details,
    al.ip_address
FROM audit_logs al
WHERE al.resource LIKE '%firewall%' OR al.resource LIKE '%rule%'
ORDER BY al.timestamp DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Log Audit Recenti

title: OPNsense Firewall Rules Management
